query:
SELECT r.id as request_id, r.status, r.request_type, r.working_priority, r.priority, r.submitted_at,
       COUNT(rd.id) as date_count,
       MIN(rd.date) as first_date, MAX(rd.date) as last_date
FROM requests r
LEFT JOIN request_dates rd ON rd.request_id = r.id
WHERE r.employee_id = 450001
GROUP BY r.id, r.status, r.request_type, r.working_priority, r.priority, r.submitted_at;
command:
